titleStmt.title: SII 17.765: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 765. (A.R. No. 708 of 1904.) NEḌUṄGUṆAM, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Dīrghāchalēśvara temple.

The Śaka year 1454 and the cyclic year Sarvajit do not tally. If the Śaka year 1454 is taken to be a mistake for Śaka 1450 (current) the details of date viz., Sarvajit, Makara śu. 7, Rēvati, Sunday, would correspond to 1527 A.D. December 29, ·60; ·97.

This inscription records a gift of land, for the merit of Namaśśivāya Nāyakkar, the agent of Immaḍi Tirumalai Nāyakkar, to the deity Īśāṇḍa Nayiṉār at Neḍuṅguṉṟam, in Śrī-Rāmamaṅgala-ppaṟṟu, in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇṭalecura metiṉīmīcara kaṇṭa kaṭṭaāri cāḷuva kaṇṭa nāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu koṭātāṉ pūṟuvatakṣiṇa paccima samudrādhipati kṛṣṇayadevamahārāyar pṛthivi
rājyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa cakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 4 ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa saṟuvaciṟvaruṣam makara nāyaṟṟup pūṟuva pakṣattu [sa]ptamiyum bhānuvāramum peṟṟa revati nakṣattirattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭa
lattup palkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu melkuṉṟa nāṭṭil śrīṟāmamaṅkalap paṟṟil neytal neṭuṅkuṉṟam nayiṉār Īcāṇṭa nayiṉārkkuc cakala pūcaiyum naṭakka śrīmatu Immaṭi tirumalai nāyakkar kāriyattukkuk kaṭava
namaccivāya nāyakkar taṉmamāka Allāḷa nātar piḷḷai neṭuṅkuṉṟam Ērikkut teṉkiḻakku mātapparaiyar tāṅkalum tevar mātapparaiyar puṟavaṭai nālum Uḷpaṭac caṅki
ṟama puṇṇiyakālattile Ūravar pala paṭṭaṭaiyārum Āka Udaka tārāpūṟuvamākap paṇṇik kuṭuttom cantiṟātittavaraiyum cellak kaṭavatākavum Inta taṉma
ttukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavar gaṅkaik karaiyil kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile povarkaḷ
Digital edition of SII 17.765 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
